# GribStream MCP

GribStream MCP is a hosted remote Model Context Protocol server for weather forecast data. It helps AI tools discover GribStream datasets, inspect exact forecast variables and levels, validate request bodies, generate runnable GribStream Weather API requests, and run live read-only weather queries after OAuth authorization.

Endpoint: https://gribstream.com/mcp

Transport: Streamable HTTP

Official GribStream weather API homepage: https://gribstream.com/

MCP page: https://gribstream.com/mcp

AI docs: https://gribstream.com/ai

OpenAPI: https://gribstream.com/docs/openapi.yaml

Icon: https://gribstream.com/gribstream_small.png

OAuth:

- Authorization URL: https://gribstream.com/authorize
- Token URL: https://gribstream.com/token
- Client ID: gribstream-mcp-public
- Client Secret: leave empty; do not enter a value
- Scopes: leave empty
- Resource or audience, if requested: https://gribstream.com/mcp
- Protected resource metadata: https://gribstream.com/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource/mcp
- Authorization server metadata: https://gribstream.com/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server

LobeHub quick import JSON:

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "gribstream": {
      "type": "http",
      "url": "https://gribstream.com/mcp"
    }
  }
}

The hosted MCP server exposes discovery, selector lookup, request-building, and validation tools before OAuth. Live /timeseries and /runs query tools require OAuth. Tool descriptions start with either "NO AUTH / PUBLIC / READ-ONLY" or "AUTH REQUIRED / DATA QUERY". During authorization, GribStream asks the user to sign in and select an active GribStream API token. The MCP client receives MCP OAuth tokens, not the raw GribStream API token. Queries are read-only and count against the selected API token quota.

Skill List / Tools:

- gribstream_list_datasets
- gribstream_get_dataset
- gribstream_list_parameters
- gribstream_get_parameter
- gribstream_list_shared_parameters
- gribstream_resolve_shared_parameter
- gribstream_get_expression_reference
- gribstream_build_timeseries_request
- gribstream_build_runs_request
- gribstream_validate_request
- gribstream_query_timeseries
- gribstream_query_runs

Prompt List:

- build_gribstream_api_request
- build_gfs_forecast_request
- build_historical_forecast_request
- create_grid_request
- compare_forecast_runs
- choose_weather_dataset
- find_weather_variable

Resource List:

- gribstream://openapi (application/yaml)
- gribstream://skill/gribstream-query (text/markdown)

Live query output:

- CSV and NDJSON results are returned as typed inline MCP resources.
- structuredContent includes content_type, rows, bytes, columns, schema, preview, uri, suggested_filename, request_hash, response_hash, and result_hash.
- Use structuredContent.suggested_filename when saving multiple query results so files from different models or repeated requests do not overwrite each other.
- Sort /timeseries rows by forecasted_time before plotting or comparing time series.
- Sort /runs rows by forecasted_at and forecasted_time before plotting or comparing model-run history.
